# ductile-loads

> Loads processing tool for structural analysis

## Documentation

- [Home](https://alex-pradas.github.io/ductile-loads/index.md): Project overview and quick start
- [Getting Started](https://alex-pradas.github.io/ductile-loads/getting-started/index.md): Installation and first script
- [API Reference](https://alex-pradas.github.io/ductile-loads/api-reference/index.md): Full API reference for all classes and methods
- [Formats](https://alex-pradas.github.io/ductile-loads/formats/index.md): JSON input, ANSYS output, and Markdown output formats
- [Examples](https://alex-pradas.github.io/ductile-loads/examples/index.md): Usage examples for common workflows
